name: MapLayout Pro
description: Professional cartographic map layouts from your browser — no desktop GIS required.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://unpkg.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.maptiler.com https://demotiles.maplibre.org https://*.openstreetmap.org https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://naciscdn.org; connect-src 'self' https://*.maptiler.com https://demotiles.maplibre.org https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org https://*.githubusercontent.com https://github.com https://www.geoboundaries.org https://naciscdn.org https://*.openstreetmap.org https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com
